reason_for_decision: The article now delivers a practical band-selection workflow with enough depth, neutral framing, and system-level trade-off guidance to clear the PASS threshold.
strengths: It explains C, X, and Ku band choice as a mission-fit problem instead of a terminology comparison.
The article now covers antenna and deployment implications, not only abstract performance differences.
The layered-band discussion improves real project decision value for mixed security scenarios.
summary_assessment: This version is pass-ready. It is technically grounded, procurement-useful, and disciplined enough for a professional knowledge-base article.
